families.name: Proliferation-vs-HIF2 contrast (ccB shift)
families.rationale: Stage III-IV KIRC shifts from HIF-2alpha-driven ccA toward proliferative ccB, so proliferation markers should rise relative to EPAS1.
families.skeptic_test: Reject if delta_baseline < 0.03 AUROC over single TOP2A-EPAS1 contrast or permutation p > 0.05.

families.name: Mitotic balance vs tubule integrity
families.rationale: Advanced stage couples mitotic spindle activation with tubule dedifferentiation (CUBN loss), so the contrast should separate stages better than CUBN alone.
families.skeptic_test: Reject if AUROC <= 0.610 (CUBN ceiling) or bootstrap CI overlaps CUBN-only baseline.

families.name: Glycolysis-invasion vs differentiated nephron
families.rationale: Sarcomatoid/invasive III-IV tumors upregulate MMP9 and glycolysis while losing megalin (LRP2)-expressing differentiated tubule identity.
families.skeptic_test: Reject if delta_baseline < 0.02 vs LRP2-only or feature-importance for MMP9 is near zero in held-out folds.

families.name: HIF-target ratio (ccA signature stability)
families.rationale: NDUFA4L2 is a strong HIF-2alpha/ccA target; its ratio against proliferation should be high in Stage I-II and collapse in III-IV.
families.skeptic_test: Reject if direction flips across folds or AUROC < 0.65 with permutation p > 0.05.

families.name: Housekeeping contrast (negative control)
families.rationale: Housekeeping genes should be invariant to stage; included as ex-ante null to validate the falsification pipeline.
families.skeptic_test: Reject if AUROC < 0.55 or permutation p > 0.2 (expected outcome).
